title: India Stories Media And Entertainment P ... vs / on 24 January, 2022
body: India Stories Media And Entertainment P ... vs / on 24 January, 2022 Author: N.Anand Venkatesh Bench: N.Anand Venkatesh C.S.116 of 2021 IN THE HIGH COURT OF JUDICATURE AT MADRAS Dated : 24.01.2022 Coram THE HONOURABLE Mr.JUSTICE N.ANAND VEKATESH C.S.No.116 of 2021 India Stories Media and Entertainment P Ltd., Rep. By its Authorised Signatory, Mr.K.R.Harish, Having Office at 706, Aston, Sundervan Complex Lokhandwala Road, Andheri West, Mumbai – 400053 Also at Gee Gee Complex 41, Annasalai, Triplicane, Chennai 600 002 .. Plaintiff /versus/ Studio Green Films P Ltd., Rep by its Authorised Signatory, Mr.K.E.Gnanavelraja, Block No.140, 2nd Floor, 13/6, Thanikachalam Road, T.Nagar, Chennai 600 017. ..Defendant Prayer: Civil Suit has been filed under Order IV Rule 1 of the Original Side Rules r/w Section 13, 51, 55 &62 (2) of the Copy Right Act, 1957 r/w order VII Rule 1 C.P.C r/w Section 7 of the Commercial Courts, 1/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 Commerical Division and Commercal Appellate Division of High Courts Act, 2015 (Act 4 of 2016), praying to pass a judgment and decree :- (a) pass an order of permanent injunction restraining the defendant from releasing, communicating, exhibiting the Tamil film 'Theal' or any other underlying work or its promotional or marketing materials in any manner whatsoever on/through any and all modes, mediums, platforms and/or formats, including any theatrical, linear and/or non-linear modes/mediums/platforms. (b) Pass an order of permanent injunction restraining the defendant from infringing the right of the plaintiff for story and screen play adaptation rights of the korean film 'Pieta' and its screen play adaptation 'Moulali' by the plaintiff in any manner whatsoever including on / through any and all modes, mediums, platforms and / or formats, including any theatrical, linear and / or non-linear modes/ mediums /platforms. (c) Pay costs of the present suit. (d) Pass such further or other orders. For Plaintiff : M/s.Sashidhar Sivakumar For Defendant : M/s.Vijayan Subramanian ------ JUDGMENT The present suit was filed by the plaintiff with a 2/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 grievance that the copy right of the plaintiff is infringed by the defendant and consequently, various reliefs were sought for against the defendant. 2. During the pendency of this suit, the parties were able to reach a compromise and they have entered into a compromise agreement dated 12.01.2022. The compromise agreement entered into between the parties has also been filed before this Court by the learned counsel for the defendant. The relevant portions in the compromise agreement are extracted hereunder:- 4. Pursuant to negotiations between the Parties, the Parties have now agreed to amicably pay and settle the said matter only subject to Studio Green undertaking and adhering to the following terms and conditions: a. In consideration of the promises, conditions, covenants and warranties herein contained, and subject to complete receipt of the payment by India Stories from Studio Green of an amount of Rs. 1,10,00,000/- (Rupees One Crore Ten Lac only) plus GST ("Settlement Amount") in the account as designated by India 3/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 Stories, India Stories hereby agrees and grants to Studio Green a limited, non-exclusive, conditional, non-transferable, non-sub- licensable License to produce and exploit only 1 (One) cinematographic Film based on the Korean Film in Tamil language only, titled as "Theal" starring Prabhu deva, Samyuktha Hedge and others directed by Harikumar, the term of the said license will be in perpetuity throughout the World Territory, subject to the terms of this Agreement ("Film"). It is clarified that the Studio Green shall pay the Settlement Amount simultaneous to the execution of this Agreement and further Studio Green acknowledges that it shall not be entitled to exercise the rights licensed under this Agreement until the complete receipt by India Stories of the Settlement Amount. On receipt of the entire Settlement amount by Indian Stories, Studio Green shall release the Film on 14th January 2022. It is clarified that Studio Green shall be copyright holder of the Tamil Film titled "Theal" and other rights more fully described in Schedule of this Agreement shall be owned by Studio Green alone exclusively in perpetuity throughout the World Territory, subject to the terms of this Agreement, specifically Clause 4 and 5. b. Subject to the strict compliance of this Agreement by Studio Green, Studio Green shall be solely entitled to collect and retain all the revenues to be generated from the exploitation of Film, as permitted hereunder and Studio Green undertakes and agrees that any exploitation agreements executed or to be executed by 4/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 Studio Green in respect of the Film, shall at all times comply to the terms of this Agreement. Studio Green shall be entitled to release the Film in Tamil language along with specific restrictions as follows (i) the Film can only be dubbed in Hindi and all Indian languages, specifically excluding Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada and all Foreign languages; and (ii) sub-titling of the Film shall be permitted for all Indian and Foreign languages, specifically excluding Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada, Chinese, Taiwanese, Korean, Malay, Japanese, Mandarin and Khmer languages. Further, Studio Green shall not be entitled to undertake any publicity or marketing of the Film, until actual and complete receipt by India Stories of the entire Settlement Amount. c. Studio Green shall not have the right to and shall not develop, produce and/or exploit in any manner on any mode, medium and/or format (whether known now or discovered/invented in future) any other adaptation, derivative or other work in any language based on any part or whole of the Film and/or any of its underlying works or elements. For clarity, Studio Green is permitted to release only one Film as per Clause 4 (a) and (b) above and is not permitted to produce and/or exploit any other adaptations or derivatives of the Film and/or any other adaptations of the Korean Film or any adaptation or any work undertaken by India Stories based on the Korean Film. 5/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 d. Studio Green shall accord the following credits in all prints of the Film, including all promotional and marketing materials of the Film: (i) Executive Producer' credit to Mr. Kim Ki-Duk and Mr. Kim Soon-Mo; and ' (ii) An Adaptation of Pieta' in the beginning (i.e., opening) credits of the Film. e. All rights not expressly licensed to Studio Green by India Stories pursuant to this Agreement, are hereby specifically reserved and retained by India Stories for its own and/or third- party exploitation in any manner and at any time as India Stories may at its sole discretion deem fit. Further, Studio Green acknowledges, agrees and confirms that the execution of this Agreement shall not in any manner dilute the rights of India Stories in and to the Korean Film under the agreement executed by Stories with KKDF, inter alia including the exclusive right of India Stories to develop, produce and exploit any adaptation, including any cinematograph film, based on the Korean Film in any and all Indian languages including Tamil language without any restriction in respect of dubbing or sub-titling of the adapted content/work by India Stories in all languages of the world. It is agreed by the Parties that in the event of any conflict, overlap or ambiguity with respect to the rights licensed to Studio Green under this Agreement and the rights retained by India Stories, 6/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 such conflict, overlap or ambiguity shall be resolved in favour of the India Stories, at all times. 5. Indian Stories undertakes and confirms that any consideration amount if any payable to Kim Ki-Duk Film ("KKDF") or any Writers of the Original Film shall be paid exclusively by Indian Stories, without any recourse to Studio Green. 6. In the event so required by India Stories, Studio Green shall arrange a screening/preview of the Film for India Stories (and its representatives) prior to the release of the Film. 7. On receipt of the entire settlement amount, india stories agrees that Studio Green can exploit the film i.e, “Theal”, Subject to the terms of this Agreement and agrees to provide no objection certificate to release and exploit the Tamil Film”Theal” on 14th January 2022 and India stories and studio green shall jointly present this agreement before High Court of judicature, Madras and obtain a compromise decree. 8. Each party agrees to keep confidential the terms of this agreement at all times. 3. In view of the above, this suit is disposed of in terms of the compromise agreement dated 12.01.2022 and the terms of the compromise agreement shall form part of the decree. Considering the facts and circumstances of the case, there shall be no order as to costs. 7/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C.S.116 of 2021 24.01.2022 rka N.ANAND VENKATESH,J. 8/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis C. S.116 of 2021 rka C.S.No.116 of 2021 24.01.2022 9/9 https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/judis
